betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§8§7§oThis quest tab lists all of the armor sets available in each chapter.

It is built as a tier list, with 'Great', 'Good', 'OK' categories. Within each category, there is no specific order.

As a side note the enchantments on your armor, in many cases, are more important than the armor you wear, and it is possible to make good builds with pretty much any set!

And above all, durability eventually becomes an important resource! There are many unbreakable armor sets!

There is no reason to complete all quests in this section, they are just here to help you keep track of things :)
